candidate_role: frame-numbered visual reference candidate where available
records.coverage_notes: Manual public-page review shows an image-heavy SF6 hitbox/hurtbox frame viewer with character navigation, move category navigation, dated animation notes, frame-numbered visual references, and share-oriented animation links. Coverage appears useful for visual review but must stay permission-first and metadata-only in #138.
records.move_category_coverage: Common normals, unique attacks, special attacks, and character-specific animation pages appear discoverable from public navigation; coverage limits and completeness require later review.
records.update_cadence_notes: Public site news and page notes show dated updates; this is freshness context only and not current-fact authority.
records.machine_readability_notes: Navigation appears structured enough for a future feasibility review, but #138 records no selectors and implements no retrieval.
records.asset_url_stability_notes: Animation share links are visible as a site feature, but direct asset URL stability was not tested and no asset URLs were inspected or stored.
forbidden_use: normal public answer scrape or cache
